svg.title: Materials Modeling Landscape
svg.desc: Poster-style infographic showing GW methods, DFT, DMFT, Monte Carlo, and Cheminformatics arranged by system size and accuracy, with dependency arrows.
svg.text: Five methods — how they differ, and how they connect
Trained on DFT/MC data — enables screening of millions of candidates at near-zero marginal cost
DMFT uses QMC as impurity solver
accuracy: GW > DMFT ≈ QMC > DFT > ML · cost per evaluation: inverse order
